user.name: Salesforce Developers
user.description: Build the Agentic Enterprise. Stay up to date with news and resources for Salesforce Developers.

tweets.text:
Don't miss your chance to get hands-on with the new Agentforce Builder. 🙌

Join @Salesforce Developer Advocate @adityanaag to learn how Agentforce Builder makes it easy to generate, refine, and control agent behavior from a single canvas using Agent Script.

📅 June 17 at 10:30 https://t.co/WLGXH1YjK0
tweets.name: Salesforce Developers

tweets.text:
Your feedback helps shape the @Salesforce Developers experience. ✨

Share your thoughts on the content, channels, and programs that matter most to you in our 5-minute survey.

🗓️ Complete by June 30, 2026. ➡️ https://t.co/uruO2jQWyn https://t.co/dAzSE5Kbli

tweets.text:
One workshop. Two chances to join. 🎉

Join us to get hands-on with the new Agentforce Builder and learn how to build, refine, and test agent behavior from a single canvas using Agent Script.

🔹 June 17 | 10:30 a.m. SGT / 1:30 p.m. AEST ➡️ https://t.co/nDQ4IExYdj

🔹 June 17 | https://t.co/oF4CIhX1Gb
tweets.name: Salesforce Developers

tweets.text:
Debug faster and unify your data pipeline. 🛠️

Master the Data 360 Web SDK transformation layer. Learn how nested website event payloads flatten into Data Model Objects (DMOs) and eliminate common schema validation bottlenecks.

Track your data: https://t.co/cufFNL5lJs https://t.co/QFAiOGhnAZ
tweets.name: Salesforce Developers

tweets.text:
🚀 Introducing React on Salesforce, a new video series from @Salesforce Developer Advocates exploring how to build modern, headless web experiences natively on Salesforce with React.

In Episode 1, Charles Watkins shows how to get started building React on Salesforce with https://t.co/z2o4ZH3dEh
tweets.name: Salesforce Developers

tweets.text:
🤯 How does Indeed build and deploy Agentforce agents without ever opening a browser?

Learn how the team uses @Salesforce Headless 360, APIs, and coding agents to accelerate agent development at scale.

Read the blog: https://t.co/0zJMxkqKEt
tweets.name: Salesforce Developers

tweets.text:
Debug LWC failures faster. 🔍

Don't mistake a namespaced storage failure for a framework block. Master the three security layers isolating your components, learn why proxy unwrapping fails silently, and protect your cross-boundary data.

Secure your components: https://t.co/CWM0B1fJ24

tweets.text:

See what's new across the Agentforce 360 Platform, experience the new Agentforce Builder, and learn from experts through 150+ sessions, demos, workshops, and more.

tweets.text:

tweets.text:
Your customer data is fragmented. 🧩

The same person exists in your CRM, BigQuery, and website analytics as separate records, leaving agents without the full picture. 

Episode 3 of Data 360 Activated shows how Data 360 unifies customer data with Identity Resolution, households, https://t.co/vIdzTATM8M
